prestazioni: 2UR-GSE (4.969cc V8) forced induction via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (2.8L pulley, 8.5psi boost, 600+ WHP) with custom intercooler piping by Cusco and HKS Hi-Power 45mm wastegate for precise boost control

Full titanium 4-2-1 exhaust system by Tomei (3.5" primary tubes, 4" collectors, and 3.5" straight-through mufflers) with GReddy Revolution RS 94mm titanium tip conversion for weight reduction and aggressive sound tuning

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 24-way rebound, 12-way compression) with custom valving for the IS F’s 53/47 weight distribution, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear sway bars (adjustable 3-position) and poly bushings
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion (carbon fiber fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber hood by Seibon

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) and custom wheel spacers by 5Zigen for aggressive flush fitment

Custom LED taillight conversion by VLand (sequential turn signals, smoked lenses, and integrated rear fog lights) with Morimoto XB LED headlights (5500K, 3000-lumen projectors) and Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights
